title: Expose Graph Lab Workspace Lens
description: Expose LocalGraph as a first-class workspace lens with shortcut and tests.
convergence_criteria: WORKSPACE_LENSES includes LocalGraph; shortcut opens graph; tests cover render/navigation
findings: Graph Lab is now in workspace navigation, `G` opens it for current selection, and render tests assert local relation evidence.
tests_passed: cargo test -p revdeck-tui; cargo test -p revdeck-tui-tests; cargo test --workspace

title: Minimal Command Deck And TUI Polish
description: Add a minimal command deck overlay plus breadcrumbs/status context.
convergence_criteria: Command Deck opens/closes; previews commands/current actions; command/status shows breadcrumb context
findings: Added `p`/Ctrl+P Command Deck overlay, modal key trapping, command previews, current-object context, and command/status breadcrumb line.
tests_passed: cargo test -p revdeck-tui; cargo test -p revdeck-tui-tests; cargo test --workspace

title: ObjectBatch Commit And Contribution Audit
description: Commit validated plugin ObjectBatch facts transactionally with audit.
convergence_criteria: Validated ObjectBatch commits objects/edges/attributes/diagnostics; plugin run audit records status; contribution counts returned
findings: Added schema version 6 with plugin_attributes/plugin_diagnostics tables and host commit path for objects, edges, attributes, diagnostics, and plugin run summaries.
tests_passed: cargo test -p revdeck-db; cargo test -p revdeck-plugin-host; cargo test --workspace

title: Plugin CLI Commit And Run Commands
description: Expose plugin commit and deterministic fixture replay run commands.
convergence_criteria: revdeck plugin commit succeeds; revdeck plugin run --commit succeeds; invalid input remains non-zero
findings: Added `revdeck plugin commit <project_dir> <plugin_dir>` and `revdeck plugin run <project_dir> <plugin_dir> --commit` with JSON output and test coverage.
tests_passed: cargo test -p revdeck-plugin-sdk-tests; CLI smoke via cargo run; installed revdeck smoke

title: M2A M2B Tests
description: Add regression coverage for Graph Lab, Command Deck, plugin commit, and run --commit.
convergence_criteria: TUI tests cover Graph/Deck; plugin tests cover commit/run/audit/counts; workspace tests pass
findings: Added TUI Graph Lab and Command Deck tests plus plugin commit/run tests that verify persisted objects, edges, attributes, and plugin run status.
tests_passed: cargo test -p revdeck-plugin-sdk-tests; cargo test -p revdeck-tui-tests; cargo test --workspace

title: Docs And Verification
description: Document usage and run full gates plus CLI/global smoke.
convergence_criteria: README documents new usage; fmt/clippy/tests/CLI smoke pass; execution audit records evidence
findings: README documents Graph Lab, Command Deck, plugin commit, and run --commit. Full fmt, clippy, workspace tests, cargo-run smoke, global install, and installed smoke passed.
tests_passed: cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings; cargo test --workspace; cargo install; installed CLI smoke
